title: Square Clear Plastic Storage Containers - 540ml, 1 Piece (3 Assorted Colors: Pink, Grey, Cream) - Lightweight & Durable Food Organizer
features: SPACE-SAVING CONTAINERS: Maximize your pantry or refrigerator organization with these sleek square clear plastic containers, designed to offer 540ml of storage space in one single piece.
TRANSPARENT DESIGN: No more guessing what's inside - the transparent plastic allows you to view contents at a glance, making it easier to find what you need and simplifying meal prep.
COLORFUL SELECTION: Choose from three trendy assorted colors (pink, grey, cream) to brighten up your space and coordinate with your kitchen decor, all while keeping your food fresh and organized.
LIGHTWEIGHT & DURABLE: Crafted from high-quality plastic material, these containers not only weigh less but also withstand daily use without breaking or chipping, ensuring longevity and convenience.

PRECAUTIONS FOR SAFE USE: Kindly remember to wash before using, and to only handwash these containers as they are not suitable for oven or microwave use. Follow these simple guidelines for an efficient and stylish storage solution.
description: Introducing our square clear plastic storage containers, a 540ml capacity marvel of organization. Available in a single piece pack with a captivating array of three assorted colors - pink, grey, and cream - these containers are a delightful addition to any kitchen or pantry. Made of lightweight yet durable plastic, these storage containers are designed to last, offering a fresh and modern touch to your food storage solutions. The clear design enables you to identify contents effortlessly, taking the guesswork out of your culinary endeavors. Whether you're storing leftovers, packing lunches, or organizing dry goods, our square clear plastic storage containers seamlessly cater to your every storage need.
